= error_source_label


Returns the user-defined label of the component that caused the error, empty string if no label is set, or &#x60;null&#x60; if the message has no error. Use this for more human-readable error tracking when components have custom labels.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.doc.error_source_label = error_source_label()
----

[,bloblang]
----
# Route errors based on component labels.

root.error_category = error_source_label().or("unknown")
----
